name: Unarmoured
description: No armour, only regular clothing. Often civilians, low-tech troops, freedom-fighters, or terrorists.

name: Fast Infantry
description: Infantry able to move and react quickly, wearing only light ballistic armour. Scout troops and local law enforcement.

name: Light Armoured
description: Troops wearing full suits of metallic or ballistic, reactive, composite armour with full helmets and integrated breathing apparatus.

name: Power Armoured
description: Heavy armour with a powered exo-skeletal structure, allowing heightened close combat ability and increased heavy weapon carrying allowance.
special: May mount weapon packs (up to 3 infantry weapons or 2 squad support weapons per arm). H2H +5 bonus.

name: Assault Dreadnought
description: The heaviest armour level, a thick armour plated powered suit. Immune to attacks from Low and standard power weapons.
special: Immune to LOW and STANDARD impact weapons. H2H +6 bonus. Target AD trooper gives firer +1 to hit.
